creator: fabrizio.borelli@fblab.it
text:
Unfortunately Crest I do not own a real AR8151 card, as I only own the MikroTik CCR2004-1G-2XS-PCIe.
I would ask Mark Johnston to reopen this bug case so that some developer can figure out the issue.

I realize that this is an extremely specific case, but I tried to ask Mikrotik without receiving any response.

Unfortunately I had to solve it by installing Proxmox (Linux Debian), on which I started the Opnsense VM (14.2-RELEASE-p2).
I understand that the driver architecture on BSD is different from the one for Linux, but despite some small bugs, the linux driver works.
I pray on my knees that some developer will be willing to do some kind of "copy & paste" from the linux driver to the BSD one.
